channel.title: LinkedIn on Tyler Burleigh
channel.description: Recent content in LinkedIn on Tyler Burleigh

item.title: Yet Another Data Science Job Market Analysis (YADSJMA)
item.description: Go here: https://tylerburleigh.com/YADSJMA If your department teaches quantitative skills in SPSS, SAS, or Matlab, is it really preparing students for quantitative jobs outside of academia? #datascientist #academia #rstats #python pic.twitter.com/RmTNCBv161 — Tyler Burleigh (@tylerburleigh) September 14, 2019
